name: stage-one
description: Backend Wizards Stage 1 - profile persistence and API design assessment

scripts.seed: node -e "const { openDatabase } = require('./src/db'); const { seedDatabase } = require('./src/seed'); const { loadSeedData } = require('./src/seedData'); const db = openDatabase(); const seedData = loadSeedData(); seedDatabase(db, { profiles: seedData.profiles }); db.close(); console.log('Seed complete');"
